hooks.commandWindows: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "$root = git rev-parse --show-toplevel; python (Join-Path $root '.codex\hooks\codex_hook_bridge.py') pre-bash"
powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "$root = git rev-parse --show-toplevel; python (Join-Path $root '.codex\hooks\codex_hook_bridge.py') post-edit"
powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "$root = git rev-parse --show-toplevel; python (Join-Path $root '.codex\hooks\codex_hook_bridge.py') post-bash"
